creator: saghmrossi@gmail.com
text: In the source for Rust 1.0.0 downloaded from the official Rust website, if the "release channel" argument in the `configure` script is not set to "stable" before running `./configure`, the developer channel of Rust is compiled instead of stable, which allows use of the unstable portions of the language. Unless this was the intention, the port should probably be updated to default to the stable channel (or maybe the "dev" and "stable" channels should be separated into two different ports?)
